security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:*; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
